name: Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Set oven temperature to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease and flour a tube pan.
3. In a large bowl, beat together butter or margarine and sugar until smooth.
4. In another bowl, beat eggs and cream of tartar until well combined.
5. Gradually add the flour mixture to the butter-sugar mixture, alternating with the egg mixture. Beat continuously for 10 minutes.
6. Stir in vanilla extract.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared tube pan.
8. Bake for 1 hour and 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
